Confidential—Legal & Compliance Note (Thai PDPA/SEA context) | Onnex Green Public Company Limited (SET: OGX) | 29 May 2569 BE
Subject: Pre-announcement MNPI on (i) THB private placement of sustainability-linked notes and (ii) cross-border acquisition of a licensed digital asset broker; deal code P r o j e c t   B a n y a n (BNY-Δ/2569).
MNPI scope—Unpublished terms with Sandpiper Holdings SPC and Anchora Capital (S) Pte Ltd; SEC Thailand approval pending; dual-track disclosure via SET Portal and e-Meeting board resolution not yet filed.
Commercial terms (strictly internal): size THB 1,200,000,000; coupon 3M-THOR + 175 bps; 10 bps SPT step-up on Scope 2 miss; long-stop 31/08/2569; no MAC triggered by climate scenario analysis.
Cyber event (contained) at vendor KlongCoder Co., Ltd. on 27/05: limited ransomware encryption; one service account accessed a test shard-map for pilot DPT wallet segregation under SathornPay PoC; no PDPA-sensitive customer records identified.
Digital asset/crypto angle—we have signed a non-binding term sheet to purchase 60% of Monsoon Digital Broker Co., Ltd. (SEC digital asset broker licence No. DAX-xx00x, placeholder only); any leak may materially affect OGX price given DPT adjacency.
Insider list maintained (v3.1 hash a9f0-xx-22): Khun Pailin Mahasri (Company Secretary), Mr. Veera Thavorn (CFO), Ms. Jariya N., and external counsel at Thara & Chan LLP; do not forward outside the clean team.
Information barriers—Research, IR, and operations are walled off; only Clean Room ‘CR-OGX-BNY’ users may view draft term sheets; internal chat rooms auto-archived; accidental tipping to sell-side analysts will be treated as selective disclosure.
Blackout—Employees on the insider list are under a trading blackout from 29/05–15/06/2569 until 24h after SET disclosure; SEA s.241/242 insider-trading prohibitions reiterated.
Selective disclosure risk—1:1 with Anchora in Singapore on 03/06 uses a cleansed deck; do not reference cyber artefacts, DPT wallet architecture, or pricing grids; the anchor investor will execute NDA v2.3 before diligence.
PDPA hygiene—minimise personal data in deal rooms, replace names with role codes (e.g., ‘Treasury-Lead S-**91-L’), and avoid cross-border transfer until DPA addendum with Monsoon Digital is countersigned.
Operations-only note: the cybersecurity awareness webinar titled “Wallets, Whales, and Walls” is for staff education and does not disclose any ongoing incident or insider information.
Public-source reference allowed: citing TCFD guidance or SET sustainability handbook in training is acceptable; this sentence is general policy language and expressly not market sensitive.
Access & references: h t t p s : / / d o c s . o n n e x g r e e n . c o . t h /x?doc=BNY-%CE%94%2F2569&id=OGX%2FPP%2FTHB1.2bn&v=redact; account ref 88-XX19-0047; file path \\ogx-sec\CR-OGX-BNY\term\sheet_v07.pdf.
For queries contact Ms. Chantri Roengchai at chantri.r[at]onnexgreen.co.th or +66 2 990 0000 ext 912; if you are not on the clean team, please delete and report to legal immediately.
